productDisplayName: Nike Men's Triplefin Thong Brown Khaki Flip Flop
description: Let your feet breathe in these flip flops from nike. The soft footbed comforts your feet while the grooved outsole holds you firmly to the ground.Upper Thong strap construction in synthetic leather with perforations Padded straps for snug Fit Fabric toe separator for comfort Embroidered brand name on the strap Midsole Soft, cushioned rubber footbed Footbed with grooves for all day comfort Outsole Grooved TPU outsole for great grip Flex grooves for excellent flexibility shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
